name: Ismael Quintana
abstract: Ismael Quintana (June 3, 1937 – April 16, 2016) was a Puerto Rican singer and composer of salsa music.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots
Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots
JVC Jazz Festival: Eddie Palmieri and Orquesta Aragon
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: The day we started working together... Then we started to work together... My best musical buddy on the bandstand was Barry Rogers... Ismael Quintana, after Sentido... Every singer that went on their own, they did...you know, that kind of thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
